name: lecture-transcriber
description: Production-ready lecture transcription and summarization SaaS

scripts.dev:reset: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*record-audio*next*dev*' } | ForEach-Object { Invoke-CimMethod -InputObject $_ -MethodName Terminate -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null }" && next dev
scripts.dev:kill: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*record-audio*next*dev*' } | ForEach-Object { Invoke-CimMethod -InputObject $_ -MethodName Terminate -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null }"
